title: Hoe Harvester
description: A simple datapack that adds an enchantment to hoes, allowing them to automatically replant seeds when harvesting crops.
body:
Request your own data pack [here](https://forms.gle/rjLp2HzTL3mspPDq9) (You get credited for the idea, and a custom role on my discord)
# 
With this datapack, you can enchant your hoe with a special farming ability:

🛠️ Automatically replants seeds (or crops) when harvesting fully-grown:
- Wheat
- Carrots
- Potatoes
- Beetroot
- Nether Warts

**No more tedious replanting!** Just harvest and let the enchantment handle the rest. This feature is perfect for efficient and effortless farming.
